LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.label: Biotech narrative policy
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.opportunityBands.0.d: the child faced a narrow set of opportunities, without assigning blame for why
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.opportunityBands.1.d: the child had a mixed but meaningful range of paths to choose from
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.opportunityBands.2.d: the child reached this moment with a broad range of possible paths
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.opportunityBands.3.d: the child reached this moment with an exceptional breadth of possible paths
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.familySinceBirthNarr: {0}'s exact family continuity has been tracked since birth.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.familyObservedNarrat: This growth continues the directly observed childhood story around {0}.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.familyBaselineNarrat: This growth belongs to {0}'s exact known family continuity.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.identityNarrativeFor: {0}'s current visible xenotype is {1}; treat it as present identity, never as a prediction about genes.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.geneIdentityNarrativ: The visible gene-identity change affecting {0} centered on {1}; keep it as one bounded theme, never a gene list.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.psychicBondNarrative: {0} and {1} have a verified psychic-bond phase: {2}; do not infer romance, consent, destiny, or permanence.
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.observationBands.0.d: there are a few exact memories of this adult teaching or playing with the child
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.observationBands.1.d: this adult has been a steady, directly observed presence in the child's learning
LanguageData.Diary_BiotechPolicy.observationBands.2.d: many directly observed lessons or play moments connect this adult to the child's upbringing
